arts.ttl: The truth behind £57m Jhon Duran bid as Aston Villa transfer stance revealed
arts.sum: It's thought that the offer submitted by the Hammers was lower than the £57m quoted and Villa are unhappy by the timing of the news, a day before their penultimate Champions League league phase clash against AS Monaco. Duran had replaced Watkins as Villa's starting striker at the start of December before he was sent off at Newcastle on Boxing Day, which brought a three-match ban.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa reject £57m bid for Jhon Duran from West Ham - with PSG also keen on Colombia striker
arts.sum: Duran is Villa's top scorer this season with 12 goals though he may again be on the bench for Tuesday's Champions League match in Monaco.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa table €25m offer for La Liga star
arts.sum: Premier League outfit Aston Villa have moved forward with an opening offer for the signature of Sevilla star Loïc Badé. That’s according to Spanish outlet El Chiringuito TV, who have…

arts.ttl: Team News: Monaco vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Monaco and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Diego Carlos to Fenerbahce, Luis Guilherme to Al-Hilal
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Diego Carlos to Fenerbahce and Luis Guilherme's possible West Ham United exit.

arts.ttl: Louie Barry Aston Villa transfer warning sent as Unai Emery handed clear January advice
arts.sum: Aston Villa talent Louie Barry has a host of clubs chasing his signature, with one club reported to be ready to pay seven figures for him - but some Villa fans in the Birmingham Live comments section reckon it would be a mistake to part with Barry permanently, believing that he could be a star at Villa Park someday. He's nowhere near the first team of a PL club, and young players need game-time not bench time.

arts.ttl: Eliot Matazo passes Hull City medical – Contract until 2029 with Championship club
arts.sum: After something of a whirlwind transfer pursuit, Eliot Matazo is now set to be announced as a new Hull City signing. Belgian journalist Sacha Tavolieri reports the news on Monday evening and it won’t be long until the Championship make the midfielder’s arrival from AS Monaco official. On Monday morning, we covered claims from French The post Eliot Matazo passes Hull City medical – Contract until 2029 with Championship club appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Submit Offer to Sign 'Incredible' Star for Emery
arts.sum: Aston Villa have made an initial offer for Sevilla defender Loic Bade, who could arrive as a replacement for Diego Carlos.

arts.ttl: Man City plan REVEALED as Aston Villa miss out on emotional return
arts.sum: The Juventus midfielder has not had an enjoyable six months in Turin following his bizarre transfer from Aston Villa, which involved several players and was primarily about preventing potential breaches of financial regulations. Man City plan REVEALED as Aston Villa miss out on emotional return

arts.ttl: PSG remain in negotiations with Aston Villa for West Ham target Jhon Duran
arts.sum: According to a report from Matteo Morretto, Paris Saint-Germain remain in discussions with Aston Villa to sign Jhon Duran (21). The Premier League club are demanding a fee of more than…
